Export Ready
Punica Granatum — Bhagwa Variety

Bhagwa Pomegranates

Bhagwa is India's most prized pomegranate variety, celebrated for its deep red arils, rich sweetness and exceptional shelf life. Grown across the volcanic soils of Solapur and Nashik in Maharashtra, our pomegranates are hand-selected, graded and packed to meet the strict import standards of the Gulf, Southeast Asia and beyond.

Variety Bhagwa (Kesar)
Origin Solapur & Nashik, Maharashtra, India
Season October — February (peak), June — August (Ambe Bahar)
Available Sizes 6, 9, 12, 16 count per carton
Packaging 4 kg & 5 kg corrugated cartons, foam net wrapped
Shelf Life 45–60 days under cold chain (2–6°C)
Certifications APEDA, Phytosanitary Certified
Min. Order 1 x 40ft Reefer Container (~18 MT)
Request a Quote
Musa Acuminata — Grand Naine Variety

Grand Naine Bananas

Grand Naine is the premium Cavendish banana variety, known for its uniform size, firm texture and ability to withstand long-distance sea freight without compromising quality. Sourced from the rich black soil regions of Maharashtra and Karnataka, our bananas are harvested green, graded by hand and packed for optimal ripening at destination.

Variety Grand Naine (Cavendish)
Origin Jalgaon & Kolhapur, Maharashtra, India
Season Available year-round
Available Sizes Length 18cm+, Girth 34mm+ (Grade A & B)
Packaging 13 kg telescopic cartons, cluster packed
Shelf Life 28–35 days under controlled atmosphere (13–14°C)
Certifications APEDA, Phytosanitary Certified
Min. Order 1 x 40ft Reefer Container (~20 MT)
Request a Quote
Year Round

Whether you are an importer, distributor or wholesaler — we are ready to discuss your requirements, volumes and shipping schedules. Get in touch and let us deliver quality you can trust.
